name: joplin-plugin-storyline
description: Fiction writing assistant with board, plotgrid, timeline and codex views for Joplin

scripts.package: npm run build && cp src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/webview.css dist/webview.css && cp src/webview.js dist/webview.js && cd dist && tar -czf ../io.arena.joplin-storyline_v0.2.0.jpl .
